mapper.select: SELECT s.submission_id, s.project_id, p.project_name, s.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, s.registration_id, s.supplier_enterprise_id, s.supplier_name_snapshot, s.supplier_credit_code, s.status, sv.submission_version_id AS latest_submission_version_id, s.latest_version_no, s.latest_submit_time, s.receipt_no, sv.price_amount, sv.contact_name, sv.contact_phone, sv.file_manifest_json, s.withdraw_time, s.withdraw_reason, s.remark, s.version, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM t_bid_submission s INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = s.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = s.lot_id LEFT JOIN t_bid_submission_version sv ON sv.submission_id = s.submission_id AND sv.version_no = s.latest_version_no AND sv.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE s.submission_id = #{submissionId} AND s.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT s.submission_id, s.project_id, p.project_name, s.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, s.registration_id, s.supplier_enterprise_id, s.supplier_name_snapshot, s.supplier_credit_code, s.status, sv.submission_version_id AS latest_submission_version_id, s.latest_version_no, s.latest_submit_time, s.receipt_no, sv.price_amount, sv.contact_name, sv.contact_phone, sv.file_manifest_json, s.withdraw_time, s.withdraw_reason, s.remark, s.version, s.create_time, s.update_time FROM t_bid_submission s INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = s.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = s.lot_id LEFT JOIN t_bid_submission_version sv ON sv.submission_id = s.submission_id AND sv.version_no = s.latest_version_no AND sv.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE s.registration_id = #{registrationId} AND s.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bid_submission
status = #{status}, latest_version_no = #{latestVersionNo}, latest_submit_time = #{latestSubmitTime}, receipt_no = #{receiptNo}, withdraw_time = #{withdrawTime}, withdraw_reason = #{withdrawReason}, remark = #{remark}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1
WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_flag = 0
UPDATE t_bid_submission_version SET is_effective = 0 WHERE submission_id = #{submissionId} AND is_effective = 1 AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_bid_submission_version ( submission_id, version_no, receipt_no, submit_time, submit_user_id, price_amount, contact_name, contact_phone, file_manifest_json, is_effective, deleted_flag, create_user_id ) VALUES ( #{submissionId}, #{versionNo}, #{receiptNo}, #{submitTime}, #{submitUserId}, #{priceAmount}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{fileManifestJson}, #{effective}, #{deletedFlag}, #{createUserId} )
